checks.name: SSN/Work Authorization Filtering
checks.details: Server-side filtering blocks SSN access from non-privileged users

checks.name: Background Check Access Control
checks.details: Background check documents restricted to admin-uploaded documents only

checks.name: Healthcare Document Types
checks.details: Platform supports healthcare-specific document types (TB screening, vaccines, etc.)

checks.name: Frontend Document Redaction
checks.details: Frontend displays "Valid" and "Cleared" status badges instead of full documents

checks.name: Route Authentication Guards
checks.details: All API routes protected with authGuard middleware

checks.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
checks.details: API endpoints enforce role-based authorization (admin, employee, jobsite, etc.)

checks.name: Cryptographic Functions
checks.details: Platform uses cryptographic functions for password/data security

checks.name: Document Type Access Control
checks.details: Platform restricts visible document types based on user role and industry track

checks.name: Field-Level Access Control
checks.details: Sensitive fields (fileUrl, SSN, background check) are conditionally shown/hidden

checks.name: Document Expiration Tracking
checks.details: Platform tracks document expiration dates for compliance verification

checks.name: User Authentication
checks.details: WebAuthn biometric + password + passcode multi-factor authentication

checks.name: Role-Based Access Control
checks.details: Six portal roles with distinct access levels (Admin, Employee, Jobsite, Onboarding, Scheduling, Contracts)

checks.name: Sensitive Data Protection
checks.details: SSN, background checks, medical records redacted at API & UI layers

checks.name: Document Management
checks.details: Central repository with version tracking, expiration dates, and upload audit trails

checks.name: Geofencing & Timeclock
checks.details: GPS-based location verification for shift punch-in/out

checks.name: SMS & Email Notifications
checks.details: Twilio SMS + Nodemailer email for critical alerts

gaps.details: RECOMMENDATION: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all data access and modifications

gaps.name: Data Retention Policies

gaps.name: Backup & Disaster Recovery
gaps.details: RECOMMENDATION: Establish documented backup procedures and recovery time objectives (RTO)
